---
name: "\U0001F4AC Hosted version interest"
about: Would you use (or pay for) a hosted team version? Tell me.
title: 'Hosted interest: '
labels: hosted-interest
---

I'm trying to learn whether a hosted team tier — shared run history, trend
dashboards, and PR comments across the org — is worth building. Your honest
take genuinely helps decide.

**How do you ship LLM features today, and do you have any quality check in CI?**


**Would a hosted version be useful to your team? What would it need to do?**


**Would you pay for it, and roughly what's it worth per month?** (totally fine to say "no")
